title: Mah
overview: A group of students has a trip to go to a jungle. They've found a weird egg in the cave and they decide to bring it back home. That makes the monster who is the egg's owner chasing after them and demanding for getting that egg back. Unfortunately, the monster can capture a girl from the group so they have to find the way get her back.
